fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Created Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time that the scheduled report was processed from the job queue.

fields.name: Output Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the output type of the scheduled report.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the scheduled report that was processed from the job queue.

fields.name: Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the object ID of the report.

fields.name: Report Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the report.
